tech_news.title: Can red light therapy really deliver a beauty and health glow up? Here's the science - NPR
tech_news.description: Wellness influencers tout the therapy's power for everything from rejuvenating skin and hair to boosting longevity. Devices sold for at-home use abound. We look at the evidence behind the hype.

tech_news.title: Tested: Windows 11 just fixed slow storage management and removed a 30-year FAT32 limit - Windows Latest
